stages.name: Runtime doctor and configuration
stages.purpose: Validate required NCBI email, available LLM provider keys, recommended publisher keys, and subscription unlocks before a run spends model or acquisition budget.

stages.name: Gene discovery and paper triage
stages.purpose: Expand the gene query, discover candidate PMIDs, fetch abstracts, then filter with a fast keyword tier and a provider-aware LLM relevance tier.

stages.name: Source acquisition and corpus cache
stages.purpose: Acquire full text, supplements, and figures from PMC, publisher APIs, Unpaywall, CORE, authenticated browser paths, and the corpus cache without downgrading already-good source.

stages.name: Source QC, supplement folding, and targeted refresh
stages.purpose: Audit missing/stub/abstract-only sources, fold on-disk supplements into FULL_CONTEXT, and acceptance-gated re-extract only PMIDs with a real deterministic lift.

stages.name: Variant and count extraction
stages.purpose: Extract variants, carrier counts, affected/unaffected counts, phenotypes, functional evidence, and table provenance from source text using deterministic pre-scans plus the LLM ExpertExtractor.

stages.name: Normalization, migration, and recovery layers
stages.purpose: Normalize variant notation, migrate extraction JSON to SQLite, then add DB-observed recovery layers without gold-PMID leakage.

stages.name: Scoring, dashboard, and review handoff
stages.purpose: Score canonical DBs against normalized gold inputs, decompose precision and failure classes, publish a dashboard, and support review/adjudication round trips.

active_loops.title: Cold-start loop
active_loops.detail: `gvf gvf-run <GENE>` runs doctor -> extract -> recovery layers -> source QC -> source recovery -> report, with corpus reuse and default source recovery.

active_loops.title: Recall-refresh loop
active_loops.detail: `scripts/refresh_recall.py` fetches new supplements, bridges corpus to harvest layout, folds source, re-extracts acceptance-gated PMIDs, scores, and optionally lands into canonical DBs.

active_loops.title: Dashboard loop
active_loops.detail: The 4 AM automation reads repo status, scores only when inputs changed, refreshes pipeline.json and strategy.json, then rebuilds docs/dashboard/index.html.

guardrails.title: No gold leakage in default recovery
guardrails.detail: ClinVar/PubTator/source recovery defaults to DB-observed PMIDs; gold-assisted worklists are diagnostic only.

guardrails.title: Surgical canonical landing
guardrails.detail: `refresh_recall.py --land` backs up canonical DBs, preserves ClinVar/PubTator/figure layer rows, and reverts on unique-variant, row-recall, or rows-mode MAE regression.

guardrails.title: Generated metrics stay out of git
guardrails.detail: `recall_metrics/`, SQLite DBs, local results, and credentials remain local; the dashboard commits rendered status and the scripts/JSON needed to regenerate it.

current_bottlenecks.title: Architecture bottleneck: source acquisition and folding
current_bottlenecks.detail: The pipeline has the needed stages, but remaining recall lift depends on getting missing supplement/table bodies into FULL_CONTEXT and refresh_run_db without source downgrades.

current_bottlenecks.title: Architecture bottleneck: count semantics
current_bottlenecks.detail: The current extraction/migration path still needs stronger preservation and classification of raw count columns so study-wide, control, affected, and per-variant carrier counts do not collapse into the wrong fields.

current_bottlenecks.title: Architecture bottleneck: matcher lanes
current_bottlenecks.detail: Already-extracted indels, compound rows, splice/IVS records, and structural/CNV events still need explicit matcher lanes or denominator treatment.
